name: Sophie Dubois
summary: Creative and detail-oriented UX/UI Designer with 5 years of experience crafting intuitive and engaging digital experiences. Proven ability to translate user needs into elegant design solutions across web and mobile platforms. Seeking to leverage design expertise to contribute to innovative projects.

experience.title: UX/UI Designer
experience.description: Led the design process for multiple client projects, from user research and wireframing to high-fidelity prototyping and UI design. Collaborated closely with product managers and developers to ensure seamless implementation of design concepts. Conducted usability testing and iterated on designs based on user feedback.

experience.title: Junior UI Designer
experience.description: Assisted senior designers in creating visual assets, style guides, and user interface elements for web applications. Developed interactive prototypes using Figma and Adobe XD. Participated in brainstorming sessions and contributed to the overall visual direction of projects.

experience.title: Design Intern
experience.description: Supported the UX team with user flow mapping, creating wireframes, and preparing design documentation. Gained hands-on experience with user-centered design principles and agile development methodologies.
